productDisplayName: Carlton London Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Perfect for those semi-formal occasions, this pair of leather shoes from carlton london is designed for the man who loves to experiment. Product Details black shoes with central lace-ups, overlays, perforations and stitched detailing Padded tongue and inner Thick rubber midsole Textured TPU outsole with a raised heel Material and CareSuede  Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine Store away from sunlight
